waste_analysis_7d.credits_burned_on_rejects_est: ≥ 787 image generations rejected — dominant waste bucket
waste_analysis_7d.credits_per_posted_pin_est: ≈ (1060 image calls / 58 posts) = 18.3 image credits per shipped pin

root_cause_ranking.evidence: Gateway returns 200 to identical body since 22:34 (verified). pinterest_credit_state.paused still =true from 21:40 because credit-probe cron hasn't fired since (backoff extended to hours). All app callers short-circuit on isCreditPaused() and never reach the gateway.

Top-up remaining 4.00 of 6914.20 (99.94% consumed). Once flag clears, image generation (~1 credit per image on gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview at typical size) will exhaust top-up within tens of images and re-trigger 402 quickly.
Contributes to the gateway 402s observed between 21:35–22:09 (before recovery). Daily cap resets at UTC midnight.

root_cause_ranking.cause: Wrong workspace / wrong org / wrong key
root_cause_ranking.evidence: REFUTED — same LOVABLE_API_KEY that returned 402 at 21:44 now returns 200 at 22:46 with identical body. Key & workspace routing are correct.

root_cause_ranking.cause: Provider outage / expired credits / duplicate retries
root_cause_ranking.evidence: REFUTED — 39 consecutive 200s in the last 39 minutes; wallet balance non-zero; probe uses server-side dedupe.

recommended_actions.action: Clear the stale credit-state flag (owner-side, one-shot).
recommended_actions.how: Either (a) invoke pinterest-credit-probe once from /admin/pinterest-credit-protection → 'Probe now', or (b) run: UPDATE public.pinterest_credit_state SET state='green', paused=false, updated_at=now() WHERE id=1;
recommended_actions.expected_impact: Immediately unblocks pinterest-creative-director, pinterest-regen-autopilot, and pcie2-publish-assembler. Zero credits consumed by the fix itself.
recommended_actions.risk: Zero — flag will re-trip automatically on the next real 402 (guard is still armed).

recommended_actions.action: Hold image-generation pipeline at PRECISION mode (max 6 images) until top-up bucket is replenished.
recommended_actions.how: Existing PAIP v1 / PQIF v4 already enforces 95% floor. Add a soft cap check `top_up_remaining >= 10` before enqueueing a batch.
recommended_actions.expected_impact: Prevents a fresh exhaustion within minutes of re-opening the tap.

recommended_actions.action: Cut rejection waste. 787/1095 (71.9%) of generated pins were rejected in 7d.
recommended_actions.how: Tighten pre-generation gate (brief validation) so failing candidates are killed before image spend, not after.

single_highest_confidence_action: Run pinterest-credit-probe once (0 credits). Gateway is already green.
